revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]
allow specifying an image class, for inverting in dark mode

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Contains_special_characters%2Fcore here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Contains_special_characters%2Fcore for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Side box
 | class = contains-special-characters noprint selfref
 | templatestyles = Contains special characters/styles.css
 | text = 
   {{#if: {{{compact|}}}
    | You may need [[{{if empty|{{{fix|}}}|Help:Special characters}}|rendering support]] to display the {{if empty|{{{special|}}}|[[Help:Special characters|special characters]]}} in this {{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{#if:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}|page|article}}}} correctly.
    | '''This {{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{#if:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}|page|article}}}} contains {{if empty|{{{special|}}}|[[Help:Special characters|special characters]]}}.''' Without proper [[{{if empty|{{{fix|}}}|Help:Special characters}}|rendering support]], you may see {{if empty|{{{error|}}}|[[Specials (Unicode block)#Replacement character|question marks, boxes, or other symbols]]}}{{#if:{{{characters|}}}| instead of {{{characters}}}}}.
   }}
 | image = {{#if:{{{image|}}}
   | [[File:{{{image}}}|40x40px|link={{{link|}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}|class={{{imageclass|}}}]] }}
 | style = {{#if:{{{width|}}}|width: {{{width}}};}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
